targets.notes: In 2025, we adjusted the boundary for our carbon reduction and net-zero ambitions to exclude certain scope 3 emissions activities that are peripheral to our core operations or where our ability to influence emissions reductions is limited (Figure 13).
targets.title: Carbon reduction moonshot

targets.notes: To meet this ambition, we aim to reduce over time our absolute, combined scope 1, 2 (market-based), and 3 emissions by 50% from a 2019 base year, and we plan to invest in a range of carbon removal solutions to neutralize our remaining emissions.
